contracts.name: PublicCApiPrefix
contracts.rule: Public C API functions use bs_<module>_<verb> snake_case prefix.

contracts.name: CppNamespaceBoundary
contracts.rule: Public C++ SDK types live under bs::app; app/sdk is naming baseline.

contracts.name: CTestTargetNaming
contracts.rule: CTest executables registered via blessstar_add_unit_test use bs_test_<area>_<topic>.

contracts.name: ContractIdPrefix
contracts.rule: Contract IDs use C-IX, C-ST, C-FN, or C-CF prefixes without mixing.

contracts.name: ClangFormatKernelAdapterApp
contracts.rule: kernel/adapter/app sources follow repo .clang-format; batch include then src.

contracts.name: IncludeOrderNoUsingNamespace
contracts.rule: Headers avoid using namespace; include order follows .clang-format (warning-first).

contracts.name: PublicHeaderContractBlock
contracts.rule: Public headers document thread safety, error semantics, and platform notes (N/A allowed).

contracts.name: CommentVsContract
contracts.rule: Implementation comments must not contradict contracts or public headers.

contracts.name: CtestLabelsUnitAndDay
contracts.rule: CTest labels include unit and day14|day15|day16|day17; integration tests add integration.

contracts.name: ParallelTestTempDirUnique
contracts.rule: Disk-writing tests use unique temp dirs (PID/time/random); no fixed global paths.

contracts.name: BenchmarkLabelExclusion
contracts.rule: Benchmark-tagged ctests must not also carry regression label.

contracts.name: StyleContractFileRegistrySync
contracts.rule: style.contracts.json v1 active entries have non-empty verify; registry documents C-ST rows.

contracts.name: StyleChangePreservesObservableSemantics
contracts.rule: Style-only changes must not alter attach/watch observable semantics.

contracts.name: LayeredApiPrefix
contracts.rule: Adapter attach subdomains use bs_adapter_attach_<ctx|config|exec|reload|persist>_*; parser bs_adapter_parser_*; forbid legacy bs_attach_context_*, bs_reload_batch_*, bs_config_parse_* on production surfaces. See docs/BLESSSTAR_NAMING_CONTRACT.md.
